steps.title: Compare the equations
steps.content: Multiply the first equation by $3$: ${3}(0.4x+1.3y=8)$ gives $1.2x+3.9y=24$.

steps.title: Interpret the result
steps.content: That is exactly the second equation, so the two equations represent the same line.

steps.title: Choose the solution count
steps.content: Every point on that line satisfies both equations, so the system has infinitely many solutions. That confirms A.
